10_dashboard.png.alt: Optim app dashboard: summary of active contracts and upcoming renewals
10_dashboard.png.caption: Your summary at a glance. See how many contracts are active and which have an upcoming renewal.

20_contract_list.png.alt: Contract list in Optim sorted by renewal date
20_contract_list.png.caption: All your contracts at a glance. Sorted by renewal date so nothing slips through.

30_finance.png.alt: Monthly and annual expense view in Optim, insurance and bill control
30_finance.png.caption: Know your real spend. Monthly and estimated annual, so you can make informed decisions.

40_contract_renovation.png.alt: Contract renewal screen in the Optim app
40_contract_renovation.png.caption: Renew or modify with a tap. No paperwork, no hassle, done in seconds.

70_csv_export.png.alt: Contract export in Optim: compact and expanded CSV formats compatible with Excel
70_csv_export.png.caption: Export anytime. Excel-compatible CSV format, compact or expanded.

100_holders_and_address.png.alt: My data screen in Optim: manage policy holders and addresses linked to contracts
100_holders_and_address.png.caption: Your data, always ready. Manage holders and addresses to assign them to each contract.

110_contract_category_selection.png.alt: Contract type selector in Optim: Insurance or Services
110_contract_category_selection.png.caption: Adding a contract is simple. Choose between Insurance or Services and it's registered in seconds.

120_contract_category_insurante_type_sel.alt: Insurance type selection in Optim: car, home, health, life and motorcycle
120_contract_category_insurante_type_sel.caption: All insurance types covered. Car, home, health, life and motorcycle in one place.

130_contract_category_utilities_type_sel.alt: Utility type selection in Optim: electricity, water, gas and internet
130_contract_category_utilities_type_sel.caption: And your utilities too. Electricity, water, gas and internet all under control.
